DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Oct-18-2010 Off Calendar

Mtn To Set Aside Dismissal
Off Calendar Oct-15-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF LEO SANDERS MOTION TO SET ASIDE DISMISSAL. Appearances: Leo Sanders (no phone number given) plaintiff appearing without his counsel of record. No other appearances. Discussed and the court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: off calendar. No proof of service, no courtesy copies, and register of actions indicates that plaintiff has filed an appeal. Accordingly, this court lacks jurisdiction. (302/CWW) Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Reporter: Candace Yount, CSR #2737

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-27-2010 Off Calendar

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Sep-02-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
DEFENDANTS DAVID DENG AND ANGELITA DENG'S DEMURRER TO PLAINTIFF'S FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT.

APPEARANCES: Milla L. Lvovich, Esq. of Lvovich & Volchegursky LLP 392-2560 for pltf & opposing party; Marcus T. Brown, Esq. of Wolfe & Wyman LLP 925/280-0004 for defts & moving parties.

RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling - SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. PRIOR DEMURRERS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND, AND PLAINTIFF'S SUBSEQUENT DISMISSALS WITHOUT PREJUDICE NOT PROPER. SEE RUTTER CIVIL PROCEDURE BEFORE TRIAL SECTION 11:19. THE GRAVAMAN OF THE 2 PRIOR ACTIONS AND THIS ACTION IS THE SAME, AND PLAINTIFF IS BARRED FROM BRINGING THIS ACTION BY THE DISPOSITIONS OF ACTIONS ONE AND TWO. Order & judgment signed in open court. (302/CWW) JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797

APPEARANCES: Milla L. Lvovich, Esq. of Lvovich & Volchegursky LLP 392-2560 for pltf & opposing party; Marcus T. Brown, Esq. of Wolfe & Wyman LLP 925/280-0004 for defts & moving parties.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling - OFF CALENDAR AS MOOT IN VIEW OF RULING ON DEMURRER. (302/CWW) JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jul-22-2010 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANTS DAVID DENG AND ANGELITA DENG'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Appearances: Alexander Volchegursky of Lvovich & Volchegursky LLP (392.2560) for plaintiff and responding party; Marcus T. Brown of Wolfe & Wyman LLP (925.280.0004) for defendants and moving parties. Mr. Volchegursky represented that a first amended complaint was filed on July 20, 2010.The Court vacated its tentative ruling and took the matter off calendar. (302/CWW) Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard, Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR #5797
